name: Chicken Royale
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Dressing made with raspberry vinaigrette
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound the chicken pieces to a thickness of 1/4 inch.
2. Roll the cheese quarters in walnuts.
3. Place one spinach leaf on each breast, top with a cheese quarter.
4. Fold the chicken around the spinach and cheese to form a mound.
5. Sprinkle salt and pepper over the chicken.
6. Place the chicken in a baking pan. Cover and bake at 350°F for 30 minutes or until the chicken is fork tender.
7. In a small saucepan, mix together the white wine and raspberry vinaigrette dressing. Cook over medium heat until the sauce reduces by half, then stir in the margarine. Heat until the margarine melts and stir until the sauce is smooth.
8. Pour the sauce over the chicken. Serve with rice.
If raspberry vinaigrette dressing is not available, substitute 1/4 cup of bottled reduced-calorie red wine vinegar and oil dressing and 1/4 cup seedless raspberry jam. Omit the margarine.
